sources.title: User interface guidance

sources.title: CUI ISB
sources.notes: Archived ISB standards landing page for the CUI family, localized after browser-based verification.

sources.title: NHS Common User Interface
sources.notes: Archived front page of the original NHS Common User Interface programme site.

sources.title: Register.aspx
sources.notes: Archived registration page showing how the historical programme distributed gated access and downloads.

sources.title: Deprecation notice for CUI
sources.notes: Official deprecation notice PDF linked from the NHS Digital ISB 1500-1508 page.

sources.title: rbirkby/mscui toolkit mirror
sources.notes: Localized toolkit source mirror containing code, sample website assets, and bundled guidance PDFs.

sources.title: Microsoft Helps Developers of Clinical User Interfaces Improve Efficiency, Patient Safety With Free Toolkit
sources.notes: Official Microsoft launch press release.

sources.title: Updated Microsoft Health Common User Interface Furthers Clinical Effectiveness, Increases Patient Safety
sources.notes: Official Microsoft press release for version 1.3.

sources.title: ISB 1500-1508: Common User Interface
sources.notes: Official NHS Digital deprecation notice linking to archived CUI guidance and standards.

sources.title: Common User Interface standards
sources.notes: Current NHS Standards Directory summary of the CUI standard family.

sources.title: Why we are deprecating and then withdrawing the NHS Common User Interface
sources.notes: Official NHS Digital blog post explaining why the standards were deprecated.

sources.title: ISB 1500-1508 archived standard detail pages
sources.notes: Recovered archive branch of individual ISB standard detail pages for the CUI demographics standards family.

sources.title: ISB 1500-1508 archived documentation pages
sources.notes: Recovered documentation pages for the formal ISB CUI releases, linking DSCN and supporting artefacts.

sources.title: ISB 1500-1508 DSCN PDFs
sources.notes: Formal DSCN release PDFs for the CUI standards family, localized from the archive branch.

sources.title: CUI formal submission, development approach, and safety case PDFs
sources.notes: Shared formal artefacts referenced from ISB documentation pages, including submission, approach, and safety case material.

sources.title: CUI CAPS compliance pack and checklist
sources.notes: Compliance artefacts localized both directly from the archive and via the patient-identification ZIP bundle.

sources.title: CUI programme distribution and support pages
sources.notes: Recovered programme distribution guide and support pages from the archived `cui.nhs.uk` site.

sources.title: Microsoft Health Common User Interface - CodePlex Archive landing page
sources.notes: Recovered CodePlex archive landing page showing project description, archive size, and download endpoint.

sources.title: Microsoft Health Common User Interface - CodePlex Archive releases page
sources.notes: Recovered CodePlex archive releases page listing version history, release dates, and attached package names.

sources.title: Microsoft Health Common User Interface - CodePlex Archive license page
sources.notes: Recovered CodePlex archive license page confirming publication under the Microsoft Public License (Ms-PL).

sources.title: Microsoft Health Common User Interface - CodePlex Archive source-code tree page
sources.notes: Recovered CodePlex archive source-code tree page. The surviving exposed tree is thin and direct release-attachment URLs currently reject unauthenticated fetches, so this page is most useful as a limit-of-archive record.

sources.title: EMIS becomes first GP supplier to commit to CUI
sources.notes: Industry press evidence of early supplier adoption claims, including EMIS Web and INPS references.

sources.title: Microsoft recognises EMIS and CareWorks
sources.notes: Industry press evidence of partner recognition and a reported iLink HealthVault/CUI implementation.

sources.title: Telerik forum reference to pjd.mscui.net PrimaryCare demonstrator
sources.notes: Third-party forum discussion useful as narrow corroboration that `pjd.mscui.net/PrimaryCare.htm` was publicly reachable in 2010.

sources.title: GovLoop tweet archive referencing the Patient Journey Demonstrator
sources.notes: Third-party tweet archive useful as light corroboration that `pjd.mscui.net/default.htm` was being shared publicly in 2010.

sources.title: Microsoft launches CUI internationally
sources.notes: Industry press source adding a conservative contemporary view of NHS adoption depth at launch, including that EMIS was the largest supplier then beginning to incorporate CUI elements.

sources.title: Aintree sticks with System C
sources.notes: Industry press account of a concrete trust deployment using Medway Sigma and reporting significant use of Microsoft-developed CUI elements.

sources.title: System C interim/final results statement on Medway Sigma and CUI
sources.notes: Supplier investor-relations statement saying Medway Sigma became the first trust-wide UK product to standardize on the new CUI.

sources.title: Microsoft health patient journey demonstrator
sources.notes: PubMed abstract page for the 2008 article describing an exemplar MSCUI implementation and its awareness-raising effect.

sources.title: HCI-modelling for improving the clinical usability of digital health technologies
sources.notes: Recent PubMed abstract page describing work that explicitly combines NHS CUI and the NHS Design System.

sources.title: Civica Care Records product page
sources.notes: Vendor product page explicitly citing relevant CUI guidance such as the patient banner.

sources.title: EPaCCS Recommended IT System Requirements v1.5
sources.notes: 2015 NHS requirements document showing CUI standards and guidance still being referenced downstream.

sources.title: Palliative care co-ordination: core content. Requirements Specification
sources.notes: 2015 NHS requirements specification showing CUI requirements persisted in related programme requirements.

sources.title: Indra lleva a la Comunidad Valenciana a la vanguardia de la salud digital
sources.notes: Browser-rendered capture of the Indra/Valencia article stating that Microsoft Health CUI principles were adapted for ABUCASIS in Valencia; retained as a live-site capture because plain fetches hit anti-bot interstitials.

sources.title: MSCUI CodePlex releases page
sources.notes: Original CodePlex host referenced by the sample website and README; original host is unavailable, but archive captures have now been localized separately.
